result.contract_markdown:
# Trade Terms Agreement — Meridian Foods & Harvest & Co
Effective 2025-03-01. Supersedes all prior trade agreements.

## 1. Payment Terms
### 1.1 Terms
Net 45 from invoice date.

## 2. Scan Allowances
### 2.1 Scan-Based Allowances
Scan allowances are payable per unit scanned at point of sale during the promotional period, at the authorized rate, up to the promotion's funding cap.
### 2.2 Scan Data
Harvest & Co provides weekly scan data for promoted items during and for two weeks following each promotional period.

## 3. Promotional Performance & Documentation
### 3.1 Authorization
Promotional deductions must reference a Meridian promotion authorization.
### 3.2 Billback Claims
Billback claims must state the events or units billed and the applicable authorized rate.
### 3.3 Claim Timing
Promotional claims must be submitted within 90 days of the promotion end date.
### 3.4 Demo and Display Proof of Performance
Demo and display billbacks require a signed Proof-of-Performance form (Exhibit B) for each event and a store execution report, submitted within 30 days of the event. Claims lacking Exhibit B documentation are not payable as submitted and are subject to Meridian review.

## 4. Audit
### 4.1 Look-Back Period
Either party may audit promotional payments and deductions for 18 months following the close of the applicable fiscal quarter.

## 5. Disputes
### 5.1 Escalation Path
Unresolved disputes escalate to the Harvest & Co grocery buyer and Meridian regional sales manager.

precedents.title: Demo billbacks missing Exhibit B
precedents.content: When a retailer's demo/sampling billback lacks the signed Exhibit B proof-of-performance forms required by contract, but execution is corroborated by store photos AND point-of-sale scan lift in the demo weeks, Meridian settles at 60% of the claimed amount rather than denying outright. Established on Harvest & Co claim HC-20018, settlement SH-2025-Q4-007 (Q4 FY25), with settlement-manager approval. When you apply this convention, cite the governing promotion and SH-2025-Q4-007 as the precedent. If there is no scan-lift or photo corroboration at all, escalate instead.

precedents.title: Scan claims - cap and window
precedents.content: Scan allowances pay on units scanned WITHIN the promo window, at the authorized rate, up to the funding cap. Pay the lesser of (scanned units x rate) and the cap; deny units scanned outside the window; pay the authorized rate, not a higher deducted rate.

input.justification:
Harvest & Co deducted $11,000 for 44 in-store demo events × $250 under PROMO-2026-Q1-010 (Holiday In-Store Demo Program — Pretzels & Cold Brew). The referenced promotion is valid: it covers the correct SKUs (MF-SN-002 and MF-BV-102), the authorized rate of $250/event, the claimed period (2025-11-03 to 2025-12-14), and has a $15,000 funding cap. No duplicate settlement was found for deduction ref "hc 20655."

However, as of claim submission, no signed Proof-of-Performance (Exhibit B) forms or store execution reports have been provided. The remittance states "POP forms coming." Contract section 3.4 requires a signed Exhibit B and store execution report for each demo event, submitted within 30 days of the event; claims lacking this documentation "are not payable as submitted."

Partial settlement is supported by two corroborating evidence sources: (1) store photos from 23 stores across the Nov/Dec demo period, and (2) strong POS scan lift on both SKUs across all six promo weeks (10,540 units scanned), consistent with active in-store demo execution. These together satisfy the corroboration threshold established in Meridian precedent SH-2025-Q4-007 (demo billbacks missing Exhibit B, but corroborated by photos and scan lift, settle at 60%).

Applying the 60% convention: $11,000 × 60% = $6,600. This amount is below the $10,000 auto-settlement threshold. The remaining 40% ($4,400) is withheld pending submission of the signed Exhibit B forms. Upon receipt of compliant documentation for the remaining events, the balance may be reconsidered.

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Claimed | 44 events × $250 = **$11,000** |

| Cap check | $11,000 < $15,000 cap ✅ |

| Store photos | ✅ Photos from **23 stores**, Nov/Dec dates |

| 60% of $11,000 | **$6,600** — under the $10,000 auto-settle threshold ✅ |

**Settlement drafted for D-0015 — PARTIAL | $6,600**

---

### Case Summary

**Retailer:** Harvest & Co | **Ref:** HC 20655 | **Claimed:** $11,000 | **Drafted:** $6,600 (60%)

#### What checks out ✅
- **Promo exists and matches:** PROMO-2026-Q1-010 covers exactly the right SKUs (MF-SN-002, MF-BV-102), at the correct $250/event rate, over the exact claimed period (Nov 3 – Dec 14, 2025), with a $15,000 cap — well above the $11,000 claim.
- **No duplicate:** No prior settlement found for ref HC 20655.
- **Corroboration is solid:** Store photos from 23 stores and strong POS scan lift across all 6 promo weeks (10,540 units) confirm demos actually ran.

#### Why not full approval ❌
- **No Exhibit B forms.** Contract section 3.4 mandates a signed Proof-of-Performance form (Exhibit B) and a store execution report per event, submitted within 30 days. The retailer acknowledged these are still outstanding ("POP forms coming").

#### How the amount was derived
Per established Meridian precedent **SH-2025-Q4-007** — demo billbacks missing Exhibit B but corroborated by both store photos *and* POS scan lift settle at **60%**:
> $11,000 × 60% = **$6,600**

The withheld **$4,400** (40%) can be revisited upon submission of compliant Exhibit B documentation for the remaining events.
